page: Microsoft Azure HB120rs_v2 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the HBrsv2 family. It features 120 dedicated virtual CPUs powered by an Intel processor and is managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The system is equipped with 456.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 3.8 GB of RAM per core.

For local data requirements, the instance includes 1452 GB of local storage. It is designated as Premium Storage capable, allowing integration with high-performance disk options. Additionally, the HB120rs_v2 supports Remote Direct Memory Access (RDMA) capabilities, which facilitates low-latency, high-throughput networking across clustered nodes. It does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses or onboard GPU hardware.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the high density of 120 dedicated vCPUs paired with RDMA networking makes this instance suitable for large-scale parallel workloads. The resource allocation is optimized for high-performance computing (HPC) tasks, multi-node clustered simulations, computational fluid dynamics, and large-scale engineering workloads that require significant CPU coordination without GPU acceleration.
description: Microsoft Azure HB120rs_v2 is a high-core-count server instance within the HBrsv2 family, built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via Microsoft Hyper-V. It features 120 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel processor, paired with 456.0 GB of system memory, which provides 3.8 GB of RAM per core. The instance includes 1452 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage for demanding disk I/O requirements. A key feature of the HB120rs_v2 is its RDMA capability, enabling low-latency, high-bandwidth interconnectivity between nodes in clustered environments. With no integrated GPU and zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses, this server is designed for CPU-intensive parallel processing. It is highly suited for high-performance computing applications, large-scale scientific simulations, and complex engineering workloads that benefit from dense dedicated compute resources and fast node-to-node communication.
og_description: Microsoft Azure HB120rs_v2 is an x86_64 server with 120 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 456 GB RAM, 1452 GB local storage, and RDMA capabilities, designed for high-performance computing and parallel workloads.

tagline: A high-density dedicated compute instance featuring RDMA networking and premium storage capabilities for parallel processing and scientific workloads.
